content: {"patterns": ["API modules follow structure: import api from client, export async functions for each endpoint", "React Query hooks in separate files under queries/, use 'use client' directive", "Types defined in types.ts, paginated responses use PaginatedResponse<T>", "Auth tokens stored in localStorage with cliltutors_ prefix", "API client handles 401 with token refresh retry"]
